transcript: Speaker A: भावा, या वर्षी तर माझं कॅरिअर सेट आहे. [Brother, this year my carrier is set.] Speaker B: भाऊ असं कोणाच्या समोर बोलू नको. ते करिअर असतं, कॅरिअर नाही. अशा छोट्या चुकीमुळे इम्प्रेशन डाऊन होतं. पण टेन्शन नको, आलाय SpeakX. तुमचा पर्सनल AI इंग्लिश कोच. हा तुमचा आवाज ऐकतो आणि लगेच प्रोनाउन्सिएशन करेक्ट करतो. काही जजमेंट नाही. फक्त रोज १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस. पहिले २० क्वेश्न्स अगदी फ्री आहेत. आताच डाऊनलोड करा आणि कॉन्फिडन्सने बोला. Speak confidently, download SpeakX. [Brother, don't say this in front of anyone. It's career, not carrier. Such small mistakes ruin your impression. But don't worry, SpeakX is here. Your personal AI English coach. It listens to your voice and corrects pronunciation instantly. No judgment. Just 15 minutes of daily practice. First 20 questions are absolutely free. Download now and speak confidently. Speak confidently, download SpeakX.]
on_screen_text: ya varshi tar majham carrier set aahe. [this year my carrier is set.] Bhau asan konachya samor bolu nako. [Brother, don't say this in front of anyone.] Te career asatam carrier nahi. [It's career, not carrier.] chukimule impression down hoto. [impression goes down due to mistakes.] SpeakX. Your Daily Practice Goal. AMAZING onto the next one. Speak confidently, download SpeakX. SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE.
summary: A man's mispronunciation of 'career' as 'carrier' leads his friend to warn him about the social embarrassment of poor English. The friend recommends SpeakX, an AI-powered English learning app that corrects pronunciation in real-time. The ad invites users to download the app for judgment-free daily practice, offering the first 20 questions for free.
